title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content: While the overall sale of LDVs in California rose by 2.96%, EV sales witnessed a slump of 13.82% Year-on-Year (YoY). EV penetration in sales has decreased by 16.30% on a YoY basis. On a QoQ basis, EV penetration declined by 5.88% Â despite a 0.34% rise in EV sales QoQ. California's share of national EV sales has decreased by 6.06% QoQ. On a YoY basis, the share decreased by 32.65%, from 16.56% in Q2 2024 to 11.15% in Q2 2025.
author: Aru Somya
